# Why is this change being requested?
Check one:

- [ ] This pull request fixes an issue with the website layout or code.

- [ ] This pull request updates the website's content, including performance or rehearsal dates, page text, photos, or images. This update request is approved by the board, and I have permission to use any materials, images or logos.

# Details
## Briefly describe the reason for the change
*Please explain why this change is necessary to the functioning of the Amherst Community Band website.*

*If this is an issue with the layout or code, describe the bug or bad behaviour you saw on the website that prompted this change. Including before & after screenshots for the fix are especially helpful.*

*If this is an issue with the content of the website, briefly explain who the request for the update originated with and confirm whether you have permission from the proper parties to make the changes or addition to the website. This may include getting permission from the Amherst Community Band board, guest conductors, or photographers to include their materials.*

## Technical Details
*If the problem is occurring on certain browsers or devices (e.g. issues appear on iPhone-sized screens, but not desktop), please state that here.*

## Optional Screenshots
*Screenshots are especially helpful for diagnosing and fixing issues with layout or visuals.*
